title: erigeron acris var. pseudoelongatus
intro: Erigeron acris var. pseudoelongatus, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its medicinal properties and health benefits are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alpine Fleabane can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and fever to skin conditions and digestive problems.
